meta.title: Jaguar Ingenium 2.0 Diesel Engine — Specs, Reliability & Replacement Cost

hero.tagPill: Jaguar • Ingenium 2.0 Diesel • Diesel • 2.0L I4 Turbo • 2015–present
hero.h1: Jaguar Ingenium 2.0 Diesel Engine — Specs, Reliability & Replacement Cost
hero.subHeadline: The Jaguar Ingenium 2.0 diesel is a modern, efficient four-cylinder — but early timing‑chain failures are a well‑known weakness. Backed by 590+ real UK enquiries in 2025 [JAG‑VERIFIED].

rows.metric: Confidence: 88% — based on 590 UK enquiries and cross‑referenced specialist rebuild reports.

rows.value: Failures are often all‑or‑nothing; timing chain stretch can destroy the engine

rows.metric: Available but with some wait; JLR‑specific parts not always same‑day

rows.value: Reconditioned cost against lowest host value (~£7,000) exceeds 60% threshold

rows.metric: Sum of the five rows above
rows.value: One-line verdict: The Ingenium diesel is efficient and refined when new — but timing‑chain stretch before 70k is a real risk — buy 2019+ or budget for chain replacement.

rows.metric: Best for: High‑mileage drivers who service strictly on schedule and avoid short trips.
rows.value: Avoid if: Budget buyers looking at pre‑2019 cars with no documented chain history.

rows.metric: Ingenium 2.0 Diesel — Where It's Fitted (Jaguar Models)

rows.value: Also powers the Land Rover Discovery Sport, Evoque, Velar and Defender → [link].
Labour estimate: Fitting an Ingenium 2.0 diesel typically takes 10–14 hours at £65–£95/hr (independent) or £110–£160/hr (London/SE dealer) [JAG‑QUOTE].

rows.metric: Shared‑cost note: Parts cost is identical across Jaguar and Land Rover applications; labour time varies slightly by engine bay access.
rows.value: → Compare Ingenium 2.0 Diesel engine prices from UK specialists
How much does a Jaguar Ingenium 2.0 diesel engine replacement cost?

rows.metric: A reconditioned Ingenium 2.0 diesel typically costs £3,500–£5,800 supply only [JAG‑QUOTE], varying by power output and specification. Fitting adds £650–£910 depending on labour rates.
rows.value: Is the Jaguar Ingenium 2.0 diesel a reliable engine?

rows.metric: The Ingenium 2.0 diesel scores 3/5 for reliability [JAG‑VERIFIED], with 88% confidence based on 590 UK enquiries and specialist reports. Post‑2019 engines are significantly improved.
rows.value: What is the most common Ingenium 2.0 diesel failure?

rows.metric: The most common failure is timing‑chain stretch and tensioner wear, typically appearing between 60,000–120,000 miles — often accompanied by a cold‑start rattle.
rows.value: Which Jaguar models use the Ingenium 2.0 diesel?

rows.metric: The Ingenium 2.0 diesel powers the Jaguar XE, XF, F‑Pace and E‑Pace — a range of executive saloons and SUVs.
rows.value: Is the Jaguar Ingenium 2.0 diesel the same as Land Rover's version?

rows.metric: Yes — it's the same 2.0‑litre four‑cylinder diesel engine, used across both brands with identical parts and shared failure patterns. Pre‑2019 examples are the ones to watch.
rows.value: Why UK Ingenium 2.0 Diesel Owners Trust jaguarengine.uk

rows.metric: * Every garage and engine rebuilder in our network is vetted, rated and reviewed by real Ingenium owners, as part of the Engine Finders network.
rows.value: * We compare real companies, not just lead‑gen sites — every specialist on EnginesMarket has genuine UK workshop premises and verified Ingenium experience.

rows.metric: * Our data is sourced from 590+ real UK Ingenium enquiries in 2025, combined with direct interviews with Jaguar specialists across the country.
rows.value: Find the best Jaguar Ingenium 2.0 diesel engine replacement UK drivers rely on. Compare real prices from trusted specialists on EnginesMarket today and get back on the road with confidence.

rows.metric: CTA Button: Compare Jaguar Ingenium 2.0 Diesel Engine Prices Now →
rows.value: Internal note: Step 0 mode = Shared (Ingenium 2.0 diesel also fitted to Land Rover models). Cross‑link to Land Rover equivalent page to be added once built.
